benefits.description: Started at 310lbs in Aug, now 230lbs (80lbs lost). Only ~5lbs muscle loss according to scan.
At 10mg has zero appetite and could probably fast for days
Goal to not lose too much muscle; lost only ~5lbs of muscle while losing 80lbs total

protocol_notes: 6'4", started at 310lbs in August, currently 230lbs. Lifted PPLPPLx 6 days/week, ate at least 200g protein, no cardio. Used GLOW for recovery. Lost ~5lbs muscle per body scan. Titrated from 2mg up to 10mg. At 7.5mg started getting hungry near next shot; moved to 10mg. Goal is <12% BF then find maintenance dose and do a cycle.
